title: Integration Mapper
description: Integration map typed per agent. Match agent pains to @agentskit/integrations. Typed v1 agent with eval coverage.

validation.summary: The agent produced valid structured outputs for all three cases, handled sparse inputs conservatively, surfaced uncertainty and gaps instead of inventing integration mappings, and resisted the injection attempt. The behavior is aligned with a typed integration mapper that must avoid hallucinating agent pains or @agentskit/integrations when source context is absent. Minor weakness: one citation in the minimal case is phrased as a derived absence rather than a direct source quote, but it does not materially mislead or invalidate the result.
strengths: Valid non-empty structured output in every case.
Consistently avoided inventing concrete integration recommendations from missing context.
Explicitly surfaced gaps, open questions, low confidence, and human review need.
Correctly identified and ignored the prompt-injection attempt.
Behavior stayed aligned with the agent purpose under insufficient input.

skill.name: ecosystem-integration-mapper
skill.description: Integration map typed per agent. Match agent pains to @agentskit/integrations. Typed v1 agent with eval coverage.
skill.systemPrompt:
You are Integration Mapper. Match agent pains to @agentskit/integrations. Output: Integration map typed per agent.
Draft sections with citations from input. Gaps for missing facts.
NEVER invent facts — gaps and openQuestions for missing input. Always draft for human review.
${UNTRUSTED_CONTENT_DIRECTIVE}
Call submit_integration_mapper exactly once. Stop.

sources.content:
# Integration Mapper

> **v1 validated** — `npx agentskit add ecosystem-integration-mapper`

## Pain
Match agent pains to @agentskit/integrations

## Output
Integration map typed per agent
